```{r}
       height = fig_height*0.495, width = fig_height*0.495)
```

### (f) Degree Quality in HS Graduation Year + 1

```{r}
outcome = "quality_bacyear_plus1"

rd_outcomes_fct() +
  labs(y = NULL,
             caption = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(lim = c(12,15.5), breaks = seq(0,20,.5), expand = c(0,0)) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

ggsave(glue("{path_figures}/graph_{outcome}_bandwidth_1_donut_nocovs.pdf"),
       height = fig_height*0.495, width = fig_height*0.495)
```

### (g) Degree Quality in HS Graduation Year + 2

```{r}
outcome = "quality_bacyear_plus2"

rd_outcomes_fct() +
  labs(y = NULL,
       caption = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(lim = c(12,15.5), breaks = seq(0,20,.5), expand = c(0,0)) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

ggsave(glue("{path_figures}/graph_{outcome}_bandwidth_1_donut_nocovs.pdf"),
       height = fig_height*0.495, width = fig_height*0.495)
```

### (h) Enrollment in a Selective Masters Degree

```{r}
outcome = "master_select_anytime_all"

rd_outcomes_fct() +
  labs(y = NULL,
       caption = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(lim = c(0,.600001), breaks = seq(0,1,.2), labels = scales::percent_format(1), expand = c(0,0)) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

ggsave(glue("{path_figures}/graph_{outcome}_bandwidth_1_donut_nocovs.pdf"),
       height = fig_height*0.495, width = fig_height*0.495)
```

## Figure A10: Placebo Analysis at Grade Thresholds Not Related to Merit Aid

```{r}
coefs_placebo <- fread(here("out/figures/raw_data/all_outcomes_placebos.csv")) |> 
  filter(outcome != "grad_7_all")

coefs_placebo |> 
  left_join(fread(here("out/data/out_vars_labs.csv"))) |> 
  mutate(
    donut = ifelse(donut == F, "No donut", "Donut [X-0.3, X+.05]"),
    donut = fct_relevel(donut, "No donut", "Donut [X-0.3, X+.05]"),
    bandwidth = fct_relevel(bandwidth, "MSE-optimal", "(15, 17)"),
    placebo = fct_relevel(placebo, "Grade 15",
                          "Grade 14",
                          "Grade 16 Not Eligible to Need-Based Grant"),
    category = ifelse(category == "Credits", "", category),
    category = fct_relevel(category, "Discrete Outcomes", "Continuous Outcomes", "")
  ) |> 
  ggplot(aes(y = fct_reorder(outcome_lab, -order), x = coef, color = fct_rev(placebo))) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "black", linetype = 2) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(xmin = ci_lower, xmax = ci_upper), position = position_dodge(1), size = .5) +
  # geom_errorbar(, position = position_dodge(1), width = .3) +
  # facet_grid2(category ~ donut + bandwidth, drop = T, switch = "y", scales = "free", independent = "x", space = "free") +
  facet_nested(category ~ donut + bandwidth,
               drop = T, switch = "y", scales = "free", independent = "x", space = "free",
               nest_line = element_line(linetype = 1),
               strip = strip_nested(
                 text_x = list(element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
                               element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"))
               )) +
  facetted_pos_scales(x = list(
    scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-.05, .3), breaks = seq(-3, 3, 1) / 10),
    scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-.05, .3), breaks = seq(-3, 3, 1) / 10),
    scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-.05, .3), breaks = seq(-3, 3, 1) / 10),
    scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-.05, .3), breaks = seq(-3, 3, 1) / 10),
    scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-0.2, 1.25), breaks = seq(-.5, 1.5, .5)),
    scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-0.2, 1.25), breaks = seq(-.5, 1.5, .5)),
    scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-0.2, 1.25), breaks = seq(-.5, 1.5, .5)),
    scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-0.2, 1.25), breaks = seq(-.5, 1.5, .5)),
    scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-10, 30), breaks = seq(-10, 30, 10)),
    scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-10, 30), breaks = seq(-10, 30, 10)),
    scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-10, 30), breaks = seq(-10, 30, 10)),
    scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-10, 30), breaks = seq(-10, 30, 10))
  )) +
  scale_y_discrete(labels = scales::label_wrap(35)) +
  scale_color_discrete(labels = scales::label_wrap(30)) +
  labs(x = NULL,
       y = NULL,
       color = "Placebo:") +
  theme(legend.position = "top",
        legend.title = element_text(face = "italic", size = 14),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14, lineheight = 0.8),
        strip.placement = "outside",
        strip.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
        panel.spacing.y = unit(0.5, "cm"),
        strip.text.x = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        panel.spacing = unit(1.5, "lines"),
        panel.grid.minor.x = element_line(color = alpha("#eaeaea", .5), linetype = 2)) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(reverse = T))

ggsave(glue("{path_figures}/placebo_analysis_figure.pdf"),
       height = fig_height*1.5, width = fig_width)
```

## Figure A11: Discontinuity in Predicted Outcomes at the Merit Aid Eligibility Threshold

```{r}
coef_ci_clean <- fread(here("out/figures/raw_data/rd_predictions_method_robustness.csv")) |> 
  mutate(across(c("outcome_lab_short", "outcomes_lab_clean"),
                ~ case_when(outcomes == "tot_enrol_yrs" ~ str_replace(.x, "HS", "HE"),
                            .default = .x)))

coef_ci_clean %>%
  filter(outcomes != "grad_7_all") |> 
  # left_join(fread(here("out/tables/raw_data/mean_y_outcomes.csv"))) |> 
  mutate(donut = ifelse(donut == F, "No donut", "Donut: [15.7, 16.05]"),
         donut = fct_relevel(donut, "No donut", "Donut: [15.7, 16.05]"),
         bandwidth = ifelse(bandwidth == "[15, 17]", "(15, 17)", "MSE-optimal"),
         ci_lower = ifelse(bandwidth == "(15, 17)", ci_lower, robust_ci_lower),
         ci_upper = ifelse(bandwidth == "(15, 17)", ci_upper, robust_ci_upper),
         category = ifelse(category == "Credits" , "", category),
         category = fct_relevel(category, "Discrete Outcomes", "Continuous Outcomes", ""),
         outcomes_lab_clean = glue("{outcomes_lab_clean} ({round(mean_y, 2)})")) |> 
  ggplot(aes(y = reorder(outcomes_lab_clean, -order), x = coef, color = bandwidth)) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(xmin = ci_lower, xmax = ci_upper), size = .5, position = position_dodge(.75)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = 2, color = "black") +
  facet_grid2(category ~ donut, drop = T, scales = "free", independent = "x", switch = "y", space = "free",
              strip = strip_themed(clip = "off")) +
  scale_y_discrete(labels = scales::label_wrap(40)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#3262AB", "#EB9050")) +
  facetted_pos_scales(x = list(scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-.01, .125), breaks = seq(-.05,.2,.05)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-.01, .125), breaks = seq(-.05,.2,.05)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-.05, .6), breaks = seq(-.1,.6,.1)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-.05, .6), breaks = seq(-.1,.6,.1)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-3.5, 40), breaks = seq(-10,40,10)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-3.5, 40), breaks = seq(-10,40,10)))) +
  labs(x = NULL,
       y = NULL,
       color = "Bandwidth:") +
  guides(color = guide_legend(reverse = T)) +
  theme(legend.position = "top",
        legend.title = element_text(size = 14),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14, lineheight = 0.8),
        strip.placement = "outside",
        panel.spacing.x = unit(1, "lines"),
        strip.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
        strip.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14))

ggsave(glue("{path_figures}/predicted_outcomes_analysis.pdf"),
       height = fig_height*1.5, width = fig_width)
```

## Figure A12: Effect of Eligibility for the Merit Aid in the High School Graduation Year on Higher Education Outcomes by Bandwidth Size

### (a) Enrollment in High School Graduation Year

```{r}
out = "enrol_year_bac_all_0914"

bandwidth_graph_fct(out,
                    band = NULL,
                    mse_t = T,
                    mse_t_y = 0.08,
                    legend = F) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(-1,1,.05)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-.1,.1))

ggsave(glue("{path_figures}/bandwidth_{out}_mse_bandwidth_nocovs.pdf"),
         height = fig_height/2, width = fig_width/2)
```

### (b) Any Enrollment

```{r}
out = "enrol_anytime_all_0914"

bandwidth_graph_fct(out,
                    band = NULL,
                    mse_t = F,
                    legend = F) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(-1,1,.05)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-.1,.1))

ggsave(glue("{path_figures}/bandwidth_{out}_mse_bandwidth_nocovs.pdf"),
         height = fig_height/2, width = fig_width/2)
```

### (c) Enrollment in 2nd Year in HS Graduation Year + 1

```{r}
out = "enrol_2_ontime_all_0914"

bandwidth_graph_fct(out,
                    band = NULL,
                    mse_t = F,
                    legend = F) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(-1,1,.05)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-.1,.1))

ggsave(glue("{path_figures}/bandwidth_{out}_mse_bandwidth_nocovs.pdf"),
         height = fig_height/2, width = fig_width/2)
```

### (d) Any Enrollment in 2nd Year

```{r}
out = "enrol_2_anytime_all_0914"

bandwidth_graph_fct(out,
                    band = NULL,
                    mse_t = F,
                    legend = F) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(-1,1,.05)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-.1,.1))

ggsave(glue("{path_figures}/bandwidth_{out}_mse_bandwidth_nocovs.pdf"),
         height = fig_height/2, width = fig_width/2)
```

### (e) Enrollment in 3nd Year in HS Graduation Year + 2

```{r}
out = "enrol_3_ontime_all_0914"

bandwidth_graph_fct(out,
                    band = NULL,
                    mse_t = F,
                    legend = F) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(-1,1,.05)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-.1,.1))

ggsave(glue("{path_figures}/bandwidth_{out}_mse_bandwidth_nocovs.pdf"),
         height = fig_height/2, width = fig_width/2)
```

### (f) Any Enrollment in 3rd Year

```{r}
out = "enrol_3_anytime_all_0914"

bandwidth_graph_fct(out,
                    band = NULL,
                    mse_t = F,
                    legend = F) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(-1,1,.05)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-.1,.1))

ggsave(glue("{path_figures}/bandwidth_{out}_mse_bandwidth_nocovs.pdf"),
         height = fig_height/2, width = fig_width/2)
```

### (g) Number of Years in Higher Education

```{r}
out = "tot_enrol_yrs"

bandwidth_graph_fct(out,
                    band = NULL,
                    mse_t = F,
                    legend = F) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(-1,1,.1)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-.5,.5))

ggsave(glue("{path_figures}/bandwidth_{out}_mse_bandwidth_nocovs.pdf"),
         height = fig_height/2, width = fig_width/2)
```

### (h) Highest Level of Study Attained

```{r}
out = "max_enrol_degetu"

bandwidth_graph_fct(out,
                    band = NULL,
                    mse_t = F,
                    legend = F) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(-1,1,.1)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-.5,.5))

ggsave(glue("{path_figures}/bandwidth_{out}_mse_bandwidth_nocovs.pdf"),
         height = fig_height/2, width = fig_width/2)
```

### (i) Degree Completion within 5 Years

```{r}
out = "grad_5_all"

bandwidth_graph_fct(out,
                    band = NULL,
                    mse_t = F,
                    legend = F) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(-1,1,.1)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-.1,.1))

ggsave(glue("{path_figures}/bandwidth_{out}_mse_bandwidth_nocovs.pdf"),
         height = fig_height/2, width = fig_width/2)
```

### (i) Degree Completion within 9 Years

```{r}
out = "grad_9_all"

bandwidth_graph_fct(out,
                    band = NULL,
                    mse_t = F,
                    legend = F) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(-1,1,.1)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-.5,.5))

ggsave(glue("{path_figures}/bandwidth_{out}_mse_bandwidth_nocovs.pdf"),
         height = fig_height/2, width = fig_width/2)
```

### (j) Degree Quality in High School Graduation Year

```{r}
out = "quality"

bandwidth_graph_fct(out,
                    band = NULL,
                    mse_t = F,
                    legend = F) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(-1,1,.1)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-.5,.5))

ggsave(glue("{path_figures}/bandwidth_{out}_mse_bandwidth_nocovs.pdf"),
         height = fig_height/2, width = fig_width/2)
```

### (k) Degree Quality in High School Graduation Year + 1

```{r}
out = "quality_bacyear_plus1"

bandwidth_graph_fct(out,
                    band = NULL,
                    mse_t = F,
                    legend = F) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(-1,1,.1)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-.5,.5))

ggsave(glue("{path_figures}/bandwidth_{out}_mse_bandwidth_nocovs.pdf"),
         height = fig_height/2, width = fig_width/2)
```

### (l) Degree Quality in High School Graduation Year + 2

```{r}
out = "quality_bacyear_plus2"

bandwidth_graph_fct(out,
                    band = NULL,
                    mse_t = F,
                    legend = F) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(-1,1,.1)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-.5,.5))

ggsave(glue("{path_figures}/bandwidth_{out}_mse_bandwidth_nocovs.pdf"),
         height = fig_height/2, width = fig_width/2)
```

### (m) Enrollment in a Masters Degree

```{r}
out = "master_anytime_all"

bandwidth_graph_fct(out,
                    band = NULL,
                    mse_t = F,
                    legend = F) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(-1,1,.05)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-.1,.1))

ggsave(glue("{path_figures}/bandwidth_{out}_mse_bandwidth_nocovs.pdf"),
         height = fig_height/2, width = fig_width/2)
```

### (n) Enrollment in a Selective Masters Degree

```{r}
out = "master_select_anytime_all"

bandwidth_graph_fct(out,
                    band = NULL,
                    mse_t = F,
                    legend = F) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(-1,1,.05)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-.1,.1))

ggsave(glue("{path_figures}/bandwidth_{out}_mse_bandwidth_nocovs.pdf"),
         height = fig_height/2, width = fig_width/2)
```

### (o) Masters Degree Quality 

```{r}
out = "quality_first_grad_degree"

bandwidth_graph_fct(out,
                    band = NULL,
                    mse_t = F,
                    legend = F) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(-1,1,.1)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-.5,.5))

ggsave(glue("{path_figures}/bandwidth_{out}_mse_bandwidth_nocovs.pdf"),
         height = fig_height/2, width = fig_width/2)
```

### (p) Total Number of Credits Obtained

```{r}
out = "max_ects_credits"

bandwidth_graph_fct(out,
                    band = NULL,
                    mse_t = F,
                    legend = F) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(-50,50,10)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-50,50))

ggsave(glue("{path_figures}/bandwidth_{out}_mse_bandwidth_nocovs.pdf"),
         height = fig_height/2, width = fig_width/2)
```

## Figure A13: Discontinuity Estimates for Different Sets of Controls

```{r}
# load coefs
coef_ci <- fread(here("out/figures/raw_data/all_outcomes_nocovs_gender_all_covs.csv")) |> 
  filter(outcome != "grad_7_all")

# plot results
coef_ci |>
  left_join(fread(here("out/data/out_vars_labs.csv"))) |>
  left_join(fread(here("out/data/mean_y_outcomes.csv"))) |> 
  mutate(outcome = str_remove(outcome, "_all|_all_0914"),
         bandwidth = ifelse(h_bandwidth == 1, "(15, 17)", "MSE-optimal"),
         ci_lower = ifelse(bandwidth == "(15, 17)", ci_lower, robust_ci_lower),
         ci_upper = ifelse(bandwidth == "(15, 17)", ci_upper, robust_ci_upper),
         control_vec = case_match(controls,
                                  "all" ~ "All controls",
                                  "gender_only" ~ "Only gender",
                                  "no_controls" ~ "No controls (baseline)"),
         control_vec = fct_relevel(control_vec, "No controls (baseline)","Only gender", "All"),
         outcome_lab = glue("{outcome_lab} ({round(mean_y, 2)})"),
         category = ifelse(category == "Credits", "", category),
         category = fct_relevel(category, "Discrete Outcomes", "Continuous Outcomes", "")) |> 
  ggplot(aes(y = fct_reorder(outcome_lab, -order), x = coef, color = fct_rev(control_vec))) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = 2, color = "black") +
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(.75)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = ci_lower, xmax = ci_upper), position = position_dodge(.75), width = .2) +
  facet_grid2(category ~ bandwidth, scales = T, axes = "x", independent = "x", space = "free", switch = "y") +
  labs(color = NULL,
       y = NULL,
       x = NULL) +
  scale_y_discrete(labels = scales::label_wrap(35)) +
  scale_color_discrete(labels = scales::label_wrap(15), guide = guide_legend(reverse = T)) +
  # scale_y_discrete(labels = scales::label_wrap(40)) +
  facetted_pos_scales(x = list(scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-.08, .08), breaks = c(-0.08, -0.04, 0, 0.04, 0.08)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-.08, .08), breaks = c(-0.08, -0.04, 0, 0.04, 0.08)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-.4, .4), breaks = seq(-.5, .5, .1)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-.4, .4), breaks = seq(-.5, .5, .1)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-20, 20), breaks = seq(-20, 20, 10)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-20, 20), breaks = seq(-20, 20, 10)))) +
  theme(legend.position = "top",
        legend.title = element_text(size = 14),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14, lineheight = 0.8),
        strip.placement = "outside",
        panel.spacing.x = unit(1, "lines"),
        strip.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
        strip.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14))

ggsave(glue("{path_figures}/nocovs_gender_allcovs_comparison.pdf"),
       height = fig_height*1.5, width = fig_width)
```

## Figure A14: Discontinuity Estimates Conditional on Enrollment in Higher Education

```{r}
# load coefs
coef_ci <- fread(here("out/figures/raw_data/all_outcomes_baseline_condenrollment.csv")) |> 
  filter(outcome != "grad_7_all")

# plot results
coef_ci |>
  left_join(fread(here("out/data/out_vars_labs.csv"))) |>
  left_join(fread(here("out/data/mean_y_outcomes.csv"))) |> 
  mutate(bandwidth = ifelse(h_bandwidth == 1, "(15, 17)", "MSE-optimal"),
         ci_lower = ifelse(bandwidth == "(15, 17)", ci_lower, robust_ci_lower),
         ci_upper = ifelse(bandwidth == "(15, 17)", ci_upper, robust_ci_upper),
         sample = case_match(sample,
                                  "baseline" ~ "Baseline",
                                  "conditional on enrollment" ~ "Conditional on enrollment"),
         outcome_lab = glue("{outcome_lab} ({round(mean_y, 2)})"),
         category = ifelse(category == "Credits", "", category),
         category = fct_relevel(category, "Discrete Outcomes", "Continuous Outcomes", "")) |> 
  ggplot(aes(y = fct_reorder(outcome_lab, -order), x = coef, color = fct_rev(sample))) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = 2, color = "black") +
  geom_pointrange(aes(xmin = ci_lower, xmax = ci_upper), position = position_dodge(.75), size = .5) +
  facet_grid2(category ~ bandwidth, scales = T, axes = "x", independent = "x", space = "free", switch = "y") +
  facetted_pos_scales(x = list(scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-.08, .08), breaks = c(-0.08, -0.04, 0, 0.04, 0.08)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-.08, .08), breaks = c(-0.08, -0.04, 0, 0.04, 0.08)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-.4, .4), breaks = seq(-.5, .5, .1)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-.4, .4), breaks = seq(-.5, .5, .1)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-20, 20), breaks = seq(-20, 20, 10)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-20, 20), breaks = seq(-20, 20, 10)))) +
  scale_y_discrete(labels = scales::label_wrap(35)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#3262AB", "#EB9050")) +
  labs(color = NULL,
       y = NULL,
       x = NULL) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(reverse = T)) +
  theme(legend.position = "top",
        legend.title = element_text(size = 14),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14, lineheight = 0.8),
        strip.placement = "outside",
        panel.spacing.x = unit(1, "lines"),
        strip.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
        strip.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14))

ggsave(glue("{path_figures}/baseline_condenrollment_comparison.pdf"),
       height = fig_height*1.5, width = fig_width)
```

## Figure A15: Different Donut Limits

```{r}
coef_ci_donut <- fread(here("out/figures/raw_data/all_outcomes_different_donuts.csv")) |> 
  filter(outcome != "grad_7_all")

coef_ci_donut |> 
  left_join(fread(here("out/data/out_vars_labs.csv"))) |> 
  left_join(fread(here("out/data/mean_y_outcomes.csv"))) |> 
  mutate(donut_lab = case_match(donut,
                                "donut_baseline" ~ "Baseline: [15.7, 16.05]",
                                "donut_15_65" ~ "[15.65, 16.05]",
                                "donut_15_75" ~ "[15.75, 16.05]"),
         donut_lab = fct_relevel(donut_lab, "Baseline: [15.7, 16.05]", "[15.65, 16.05]", "[15.75, 16.05]"),
         bandwidth = ifelse(h_bandwidth == 1, "(15, 17)", "MSE-optimal"),
         ci_lower = ifelse(bandwidth == "(15, 17)", ci_lower, robust_ci_lower),
         ci_upper = ifelse(bandwidth == "(15, 17)", ci_upper, robust_ci_upper),
         outcome_lab = glue("{outcome_lab} ({round(mean_y, 2)})"),
         category = ifelse(category == "Credits", "", category),
         category = fct_relevel(category, "Discrete Outcomes", "Continuous Outcomes", "")) |> 
  ggplot(aes(y = fct_reorder(outcome_lab, -order), x = coef, color = fct_rev(donut_lab))) +
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(.75)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = ci_lower, xmax = ci_upper), position = position_dodge(.75), width = .1) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "black", linetype = 2) +
  labs(x = NULL,
       y = NULL,
       color = "Donut limits:") +
  facet_grid2(category ~ bandwidth, drop = T, scales = "free", independent = "x", space = "free", switch = "y") +
  facetted_pos_scales(x = list(scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-.07, .07), breaks = seq(-.06, .06, .03)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-.07, .07), breaks = seq(-.06, .06, .03)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-.4, .4), breaks = seq(-.4, .4, .2)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-.4, .4), breaks = seq(-.4, .4, .2)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-20, 20), breaks = seq(-20, 15, 10)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-20, 20), breaks = seq(-20, 15, 10)))) +
  scale_y_discrete(labels = scales::label_wrap(35)) +
  theme(legend.position = "top",
        legend.title = element_text(size = 14),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14, lineheight = 0.8),
        strip.placement = "outside",
        panel.spacing.x = unit(1, "lines"),
        strip.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
        strip.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14)) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(reverse = T))

ggsave(glue("{path_figures}/alloutcomes_different_donuts.pdf"),
       height = fig_height*1.5, width = fig_width)
```

## Figure A16: Power Curves for Discrete Outcomes

```{r}
# load power analysis for binary outcomes
power_rdpower <- fread(here(paste0("out/data/rdpower_all_binary_outcomes.csv")))

# binary outcomes
outcome_binary = c("enrol_year_bac_all_0914", "enrol_anytime_all_0914",
                   "enrol_2_ontime_all_0914", "enrol_2_anytime_all_0914",
                   "enrol_3_ontime_all_0914", "enrol_3_anytime_all_0914",
                   "grad_5_all", "grad_9_all", "master_anytime_all", "master_select_anytime_all")

out_vars_labs <- fread(here("out/data/out_vars_labs.csv"))

# join crosswalk with power data
power_rdpower <- power_rdpower |> 
  left_join(out_vars_labs) |> 
  filter(outcome %in% outcome_binary) |> 
  mutate(outcome_lab_w_mean = glue("**{outcome_lab_short}**<br><span style='font-size:12pt'>_baseline mean: {scales::percent(y_mean, accuracy = .1)}_"),
         outcome_lab_w_mean = str_replace(outcome_lab_w_mean, "Graduation", "Grad."))

# obtain minimum detectable effects
min_detect_effect <- power_rdpower |> 
  filter(power >= .8) |> 
  slice_min(tau, by = c(outcome, bandwidth)) |> 
  mutate(hjust = ifelse(bandwidth == "MSE-optimal", -0.02, 1.02),
         hjust = ifelse(outcome %in% c("grad_5_all", "master_select_anytime_all"), 1.02, hjust),
         vjust = 0.5,
         vjust = ifelse(bandwidth == "MSE-optimal" & outcome %in% c("grad_5_all", "master_select_anytime_all"), .8, vjust),
         y_value = ifelse(bandwidth == "MSE-optimal", .55, .975),
         pct = tau/y_mean)

## All binary outcomes
# plot power functions with minimum detectable effects
power_rdpower |> 
  filter(tau > 0) |>  
  ggplot(aes(x = tau*100, y = power, color = bandwidth)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_hline(yintercept = .8, color = "grey40", linetype = 2, alpha = .5) +
  geom_vline(data = min_detect_effect, aes(xintercept = tau*100, color = bandwidth), show.legend = F) +
  geom_richtext(data = min_detect_effect |> 
                  filter(outcome == "enrol_year_bac_all_0914"),
                aes(y = y_value,
                    label = glue("{round(tau*100, 2)} pp<br><span style='font-size:12pt'>({scales::percent(pct, accuracy = .1)} of<br>baseline<br>mean)</span>"),
                    hjust = hjust,
                    vjust = c(.75,.75)),
                show.legend = F, size = 4, fill = NA, label.color = NA) +
  geom_richtext(data = min_detect_effect |> 
                  filter(outcome != "enrol_year_bac_all_0914"), aes(y = y_value,
                                              label = glue("{round(tau*100, 2)} pp<br><span style='font-size:12pt'>({scales::percent(pct, accuracy = .1)})</span>"),
                                              hjust = hjust, vjust = vjust),
                show.legend = F, size = 4, fill = NA, label.color = NA) +
  facet_wrap(~ fct_reorder(outcome_lab_w_mean, order), ncol = 3) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  labs(x = "Effect size<br><span style='font-size:12pt'>_percentage point increase_</span>",
       y = "Power",
       color = "Bandwidth:") +
  scale_y_continuous(lim = c(0,1), breaks = seq(0,1,.25), labels = scales::percent, expand = expansion(mult = c(0, .2))) +
  scale_x_continuous(lim = c(0, 8), breaks = seq(0,8, 1), expand = c(0,0)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#3262AB", "#EB9050")) +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_markdown(),
        plot.title = element_markdown(),
        panel.spacing.x = unit(1, "lines"),
        legend.position = "top",
        legend.direction = "horizontal",
        legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 14),
        strip.text = element_markdown(size = 12),
        strip.clip = "off")

# save graph
ggsave(glue("{path_figures}/rdpower_all_binary_outcomes.pdf"),
       height = fig_height*1.5, width = fig_width)
```

## Figure A17: Power Curves for Continuous Outcomes

```{r}
# load power analysis for binary outcomes
power_rdpower <- fread(here(paste0("out/data/rdpower_all_continuous_outcomes.csv")))

# continuous outcomes
outcome_continuous = c("quality", "quality_bacyear_plus1", "quality_bacyear_plus2",
                       "tot_enrol_yrs", "max_enrol_degetu", "quality_first_grad_degree", "max_ects_credits")

out_vars_labs <- fread(here("out/data/out_vars_labs.csv")) |> 
  mutate(order = ifelse(outcome == "max_ects_credits", 17, order))

# join crosswalk with power data
power_rdpower <- power_rdpower |> 
  left_join(out_vars_labs) |> 
  filter(outcome %in% outcome_continuous) |> 
  mutate(outcome_lab_w_mean = glue("**{outcome_lab_short}**<br><span style='font-size:12pt'>_baseline mean: {round(y_mean, 1)}_"))

# obtain minimum detectable effects
min_detect_effect <- power_rdpower |> 
  filter(power >= .8) |> 
  slice_min(tau, by = c(outcome, bandwidth)) |> 
  mutate(hjust = ifelse(bandwidth == "MSE-optimal", -0.02, 1.02),
         y_value = ifelse(bandwidth == "MSE-optimal", .55, .975),
         pct = tau/y_mean)

# plot power functions with minimum detectable effects
power_rdpower |> 
  filter(tau > 0) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = tau, y = power, color = bandwidth)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_hline(yintercept = .8, color = "grey40", linetype = 2, alpha = .5) +
  geom_vline(data = min_detect_effect, aes(xintercept = tau, color = bandwidth), show.legend = F) +
  geom_richtext(data = min_detect_effect |> 
                  filter(outcome == "quality"),
                aes(y = y_value,
                    label = glue("{round(tau, 2)}<br><span style='font-size:12pt'>({scales::percent(pct, accuracy = .1)} of <br>baseline<br>mean)</span>"),
                    hjust = hjust,
                    vjust = c(.5,.6)),
                show.legend = F, size = 4, fill = NA, label.color = NA) +
  geom_richtext(data = min_detect_effect |> 
                  filter(outcome != "quality"), aes(y = y_value,
                                              label = glue("{round(tau, 2)}<br><span style='font-size:12pt'>({scales::percent(pct, accuracy = .1)})</span>"),
                                              hjust = hjust),
                show.legend = F, size = 4, fill = NA, label.color = NA) +
  facet_wrap2(~ fct_reorder(outcome_lab_w_mean, order), axes = "x", scales = "free_x") +
  # coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  labs(x = "Effect size",
       y = "Power",
       color = "Bandwidth:") +
  scale_y_continuous(lim = c(0,1), breaks = seq(0,1,.2), labels = scales::percent, expand = expansion(mult = c(0, .2))) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#3262AB", "#EB9050")) +
  # scale_x_continuous(lim = c(0, .4), breaks = seq(0,.5,.1)) +
  facetted_pos_scales(x = list(scale_x_continuous(lim = c(0, .4), breaks = seq(0,.5,.1)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(0, .4), breaks = seq(0,.5,.1)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(0, .4), breaks = seq(0,.5,.1)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(0, .4), breaks = seq(0,.5,.1)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(0, .4), breaks = seq(0,.5,.1)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(0, 20), breaks = seq(0, 20, 5)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(0, .4), breaks = seq(0,.5,.1)))) +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_markdown(),
        plot.title = element_markdown(),
        panel.spacing.x = unit(1, "lines"),
        legend.position = "top",
        legend.direction = "horizontal",
        legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 14),
        strip.text = element_markdown(size = 12),
        strip.clip = "off")

# save graph
ggsave(glue("{path_figures}/rdpower_all_continuous_outcomes.pdf"),
       height = fig_height*1.15, width = fig_width)
```

## Figure A18: Heterogeneity of Effects of Merit Aid by Type of Degree Initially Pursued

```{r}
coef_dt <- fread(here("out/figures/raw_data/all_outcomes_by_he_type_init.csv")) |> 
  filter(outcome_var != "grad_7_all")

mean_enrol_type <- fread(here("out/data/mean_y_outcomes.csv")) |> 
  filter(str_detect(outcome, "licence|bts|cpge|dut|medecine|other")) |> 
  select(outcome, mean_y) |> 
  mutate(ins_princip = str_remove(outcome, "enrol_year_bac_all_0914_"),
         ins_princip = ifelse(ins_princip == "licence", "licence/master", ins_princip)) |> 
  select(mean_y, ins_princip) |> 
  mutate(order_ins_lab = case_match(ins_princip,
                            "licence/master" ~ 1,
                            "cpge" ~ 2,
                            "medecine" ~ 3,
                            "bts" ~ 4,
                            "dut" ~ 5,
                            "other" ~ 6))

coef_dt |> 
  left_join(mean_enrol_type) |> 
  left_join(fread(here("out/data/out_vars_labs.csv")) |> rename(outcome_var = outcome)) |> 
  mutate(bandwidth = if_else(h_bandwidth == 1, "(15, 17)", "MSE-optimal"),
         graph_ci_lower = ifelse(h_bandwidth == 1, ci_lower, robust_ci_lower),
         graph_ci_upper = ifelse(h_bandwidth == 1, ci_upper, robust_ci_upper),
         graph_sig = ifelse(h_bandwidth == 1, sig, robust_sig),
         category = ifelse(category == "Credits", "", category),
         category = fct_relevel(category, "Discrete Outcomes", "Continuous Outcomes", ""),
         mean_y = scales::percent(round(mean_y, 2)),
         ins_princip_lab = case_match(ins_princip,
                                      "bts" ~ "Vocational degree (BTS)",
                                      "cpge" ~ "Preparatory class (CPGE)",
                                      "dut" ~ "Technical degree (DUT)",
                                      "licence/master" ~ "Public university (excl. medecine)",
                                      "medecine" ~ "Medical degree",
                                      "other" ~ "Other"),
         ins_princip_lab = glue("{ins_princip_lab} ({mean_y})"),
         ins_princip_lab = fct_reorder(ins_princip_lab, order_ins_lab)) |> 
  ggplot(aes(y = fct_reorder(outcome_lab, -order), x = coef, color = bandwidth)) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(xmin = graph_ci_lower, xmax = graph_ci_upper),
                position = position_dodge(.75), size = .5) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "black", linetype = 2) +
  facet_grid2(category ~ ins_princip_lab, scales = T, axes = "x", independent = "x", switch = "y", space = "free",
              strip = strip_themed(clip = "off"),
              labeller = labeller(
                ins_princip_lab  = label_wrap_gen(width = 10))) +
  scale_y_discrete(labels = scales::label_wrap(35)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#3262AB", "#EB9050"), guide = guide_legend(reverse = T)) +
  facetted_pos_scales(x = list(scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-.1, .1), breaks = seq(-1,.1, .1)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-.1, .1), breaks = seq(-1,.1, .1)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-.1, .1), breaks = seq(-1,.1, .1)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-.1, .1), breaks = seq(-1,.1, .1)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-.1, .1), breaks = seq(-1,.1, .1)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-.1, .1), breaks = seq(-1,.1, .1)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-.75, .75), breaks = seq(-1, 1, .5)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-.75, .75), breaks = seq(-1, 1, .5)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-.75, .75), breaks = seq(-1, 1, .5)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-.75, .75), breaks = seq(-1, 1, .5)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-.75, .75), breaks = seq(-1, 1, .5)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-.75, .75), breaks = seq(-1, 1, .5)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-40, 40), breaks = seq(-40, 40, 20)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-40, 40), breaks = seq(-40, 40, 20)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-40, 40), breaks = seq(-40, 40, 20)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-40, 40), breaks = seq(-40, 40, 20)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-40, 40), breaks = seq(-40, 40, 20)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-40, 40), breaks = seq(-40, 40, 20)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-40, 40), breaks = seq(-40, 40, 20)))) +
  labs(x = NULL,
       y = NULL,
       color = "Bandwidth:") +
  theme(legend.position = "top",
        legend.title = element_text(size = 14),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14, lineheight = 0.8),
        strip.placement = "outside",
        panel.spacing.x = unit(1, "lines"),
        strip.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
        strip.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14))

ggsave(glue("{path_figures}/all_outcomes_by_he_type_init.pdf"),
       height = fig_height*1.5, width = fig_width)
```

## Figure A19: Heterogeneity of Effects of Merit Aid by Living Costs of Location of Study

```{r}
out_vars_labs <- fread(here("out/data/out_vars_labs.csv"))

coef_ci_expensive <- bind_rows(
  fread(here("out/regressions/outcomes_expensive_cities_mse.csv")),
  fread(here("out/regressions/outcomes_expensive_cities.csv"))) |> 
  mutate(group = "expensive")

coef_ci_notexpensive <- bind_rows(
  fread(here("out/regressions/outcomes_notexpensive_cities_mse.csv")),
  fread(here("out/regressions/outcomes_notexpensive_cities.csv"))) |>
  mutate(group = "not expensive")

coef_ci_expensive_sameau <- bind_rows(
  fread(here("out/regressions/outcomes_expensive_cities_same_au_mse.csv")),
  fread(here("out/regressions/outcomes_expensive_cities_same_au.csv"))) |> 
  mutate(group = "expensive - same origin")

coef_ci_notexpensive_sameau <- bind_rows(
  fread(here("out/regressions/outcomes_notexpensive_cities_same_au_mse.csv")),
  fread(here("out/regressions/outcomes_notexpensive_cities_same_au.csv"))) |> 
  mutate(group = "not expensive - same origin")

coef_ci_expensive_diffau <- bind_rows(
  fread(here("out/regressions/outcomes_expensive_cities_different_au_mse.csv")),
  fread(here("out/regressions/outcomes_expensive_cities_different_au.csv"))) |> 
  mutate(group = "expensive - different origin")

coef_ci_notexpensive_diffau <- bind_rows(
  fread(here("out/regressions/outcomes_notexpensive_cities_different_au_mse.csv")),
  fread(here("out/regressions/outcomes_notexpensive_cities_different_au.csv"))) |> 
  mutate(group = "not expensive - different origin")

coefs_all <- bind_rows(coef_ci_expensive,
                       coef_ci_notexpensive,
                       coef_ci_expensive_sameau,
                       coef_ci_notexpensive_sameau,
                       coef_ci_expensive_diffau,
                       coef_ci_notexpensive_diffau) |> 
  filter(!outcome %in% c("quality", "grad_7_all"))

coefs_all |> 
  left_join(out_vars_labs) |> 
  mutate(bandwidth = ifelse(h_bandwidth == 1, "(15, 17)", "MSE-optimal"),
         ci_lower = ifelse(bandwidth == "(15, 17)", ci_lower, robust_ci_lower),
         ci_upper = ifelse(bandwidth == "(15, 17)", ci_upper, robust_ci_upper),
         expensive = ifelse(str_detect(group, "^expensive"), "Expensive location of study", "Not expensive location of study"),
         expensive = fct_relevel(expensive, "Expensive", "Not expensive"),
         origin = case_when(str_detect(group, "different origin") ~ "Different urban area",
                            str_detect(group, "same origin") ~ "Same urban area",
                            .default = "All students"),
         origin = fct_relevel(origin, "All students", "Same urban area", "Different urban area"),
         category = ifelse(category == "Credits", "", category),
         category = fct_relevel(category, "Discrete Outcomes", "Continuous Outcomes", "")) |> 
  ggplot(aes(y = fct_reorder(outcome_lab, -order), x = coef, color = fct_rev(origin))) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(xmin = ci_lower, xmax = ci_upper), position = position_dodge(.75), size = .5) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = 2, color = "black") +
  facet_nested(category ~ expensive + bandwidth,
               drop = T, scales = "free", independent = "x", switch = "y", space = "free",
               nest_line = element_line(linetype = 1),
               strip = strip_nested(
                 text_x = list(element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
                               element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"))
               )) +
  facetted_pos_scales(x = list(scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-.1, .1), breaks = seq(-1,.1, .1)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-.1, .1), breaks = seq(-1,.1, .1)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-.1, .1), breaks = seq(-1,.1, .1)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-.1, .1), breaks = seq(-1,.1, .1)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-.75, .75), breaks = seq(-1, 1, .5)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-.75, .75), breaks = seq(-1, 1, .5)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-.75, .75), breaks = seq(-1, 1, .5)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-.75, .75), breaks = seq(-1, 1, .5)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-40, 40), breaks = seq(-40, 40, 20)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-40, 40), breaks = seq(-40, 40, 20)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-40, 40), breaks = seq(-40, 40, 20)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-40, 40), breaks = seq(-40, 40, 20)),
                               scale_x_continuous(lim = c(-40, 40), breaks = seq(-40, 40, 20)))) +
  scale_y_discrete(labels = scales::label_wrap(40)) +
  labs(x = NULL,
       y = NULL,
       color = "Origin:") +
  # scale_color_manual(values = c("#3262AB", "#EB9050")) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(reverse = T)) +
  theme(legend.position = "top",
        legend.title = element_text(size = 14),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14, lineheight = 0.8),
        strip.placement = "outside",
        panel.spacing.x = unit(1, "lines"),
        strip.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
        strip.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14))

ggsave(glue("{path_figures}/heterogeneity_living_costs.pdf"),
       width = fig_width, height = fig_height*1.5)
```

## Figure A20: Share of Students Working Reporting it has a Negative Impact on Studies

```{r}
dt_graph <- fread(here("out/figures/raw_data/impact_on_sudies_by_mention.csv"))

dt_graph |> 
  mutate(mention = fct_relevel(mention, "No honors", "Honors", "High and higest honors")) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = mention, y = pct_weighted, fill = factor(q8707_1))) +
  geom_col(position = "stack") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = ci_lower, ymax = ci_upper),
                width = 0.01, color = "black") +
  geom_text(aes(label = scales::percent(pct_weighted, accuracy = 1)),
            position = position_stack(.5), color = "white", size = 5) +
  labs(fill = NULL, x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent, expand = c(0, 0)) +
  theme(legend.position       = "none",
        panel.grid.major.x    = element_blank(),
        text                  = element_text(size = 16))

# Save to disk
ggsave(glue("{path_figures}/impact_on_sudies_by_mention.pdf"),
       height = fig_height, width = fig_width)
```


# ---------- APPENDIX TABLES ----------

## Table A1: Number of Observations at Each Sample Restriction

```{r, eval = F}
# import
num_obs_table <- fread(here("out/tables/num_obs_table.csv"))

# transpose
t(num_obs_table)
```

## Table A5: Placebo Analysis at Grade Thresholds Not Related to Merit Aid

```{r}
outcomes <- c("enrol_year_bac_all_0914",
              "enrol_2_ontime_all_0914",
              "enrol_3_ontime_all_0914",
              "tot_enrol_yrs",
              "max_enrol_degetu",
              "grad_9_all")

band = "mse"

coef_placebos_mse <- placebos_coefs(out_vars = outcomes)

n_columns <- ncol(coef_placebos_mse) - 1
  
kbl(coef_placebos_mse, "latex",
    booktabs = T,
    caption = "Discontinuity Estimates at Placebo Grade Thresholds - MSE-Optimal Bandwidth",
    label = "placebos_band_mse",
    position = "H",
    linesep = "",
    col.names = c("", paste0("(", 1:n_columns,")")),
    escape = F,
    align = c("l",rep("c", n_columns))) %>%
  add_header_above(c("", "\\\\thead{Enrollment in\\\\\\\\HS Grad. Year}",
                     "\\\\thead{Enrollment in 2nd\\\\\\\\Year in HS Grad.\\\\\\\\Year + 1}",
                     "\\\\thead{Enrollment in 3rd\\\\\\\\Year in HS Grad.\\\\\\\\Year + 2}",
                     "\\\\thead{Number of\\\\\\\\Years in HE}",
                     "\\\\thead{Highest Level of\\\\\\\\Study Attained}",
                     "\\\\thead{Degree Completion\\\\\\\\within 9 Years}"),
                   line = F, escape = F) %>% 
  pack_rows("Panel A. Grade 15", 1, 8, bold = F, italic = T) %>%
  pack_rows("Panel B. Grade 14", 9, 16, bold = F, italic = T) %>%
  pack_rows("Panel C. Grade 16 for non-eligibles to need-based grants", 17, 24, bold = F, italic = T) %>%
  kable_styling(position = "center", latex_options = c("scale_down")) %>% 
  footnote(general_title = "",
           general =  "\\\\textit{Notes:} This table reports estimates of the discontinuity in higher education outcomes, using the MSE-optimal bandwidth obtained using the \textit{rdrobust} R package, for three placebo grade thresholds: grade 15 (panel A), grade 14 (Panel B), and grade 16 for students not eligible to a need-based grant (panel C). Each higher education outcome is reported in the column headers. The grade 15 and grade 14 placebo tests are estimated over the full sample. The grade 16 placebo is estimated on the sample of students from the same high school cohorts who were not eligible to a need-based grant in their high school graduation year. In all three cases, students on both sides of placebo grade thresholds are not eligible to different amounts of financial aid. I report full sample estimates (\"No Donut\") and estimates obtained when excluding students with Bac grades in $[\\\\text{placebo} - 0.3, \\\\text{placebo} + 0.05]$ (\"Donut $[...]$\"). The MSE-optimal bandwidth varies across each specification. Associated robust 95\\\\% confidence intervals are reported in brackets. Statistical significance is computed based on the robust p-value and ***, **, and * indicate significance at 1, 5, and 10\\\\%, respectively.",
           threeparttable = TRUE, escape = F) %>%
  save_kable(file = glue("{path_tables}/placebos_bandwidth_mse.tex"))
```

## Table A6: Placebo Analysis using (15, 17) Bandwidth

```{r}
outcomes <- c("enrol_year_bac_all_0914",
              "enrol_2_ontime_all_0914",
              "enrol_3_ontime_all_0914",
              "tot_enrol_yrs",
              "max_enrol_degetu",
              "grad_9_all")

band = "1"

coef_placebos_1 <- placebos_coefs(out_vars = outcomes)

n_columns <- ncol(coef_placebos_mse) - 1
  
kbl(coef_placebos_1, "latex",
    booktabs = T,
    caption = "Discontinuity Estimates at Placebo Grade Thresholds - $(15, 17)$ Bandwidth",
    label = "placebos_band1",
    position = "H",
    linesep = "",
    col.names = c("", paste0("(", 1:n_columns,")")),
    escape = F,
    align = c("l",rep("c", n_columns))) %>%
  add_header_above(c("", "\\\\thead{Enrollment in\\\\\\\\HS Grad. Year}",
                     "\\\\thead{Enrollment in 2nd\\\\\\\\Year in HS Grad.\\\\\\\\Year + 1}",
                     "\\\\thead{Enrollment in 3rd\\\\\\\\Year in HS Grad.\\\\\\\\Year + 2}",
                     "\\\\thead{Number of\\\\\\\\Years in HE}",
                     "\\\\thead{Highest Level of\\\\\\\\Study Attained}",
                     "\\\\thead{Degree Completion\\\\\\\\within 9 Years}"),
                   line = F, escape = F) %>% 
  pack_rows("Panel A. Grade 15", 1, 8, bold = F, italic = T) %>%
  pack_rows("Panel B. Grade 14", 9, 16, bold = F, italic = T) %>%
  pack_rows("Panel C. Grade 16 for non-eligibles to need-based grants", 17, 24, bold = F, italic = T) %>%
  kable_styling(position = "center", latex_options = c("scale_down")) %>% 
  footnote(general_title = "",
           general =  "\\\\textit{Notes:} This table reports estimates of the discontinuity in higher education outcomes, using the $(15, 17)$ bandwidth, for three placebo grade thresholds: grade 15 (panel A), grade 14 (Panel B), and grade 16 for students not eligible to a need-based grant (panel C). Each higher education outcome is reported in the column headers. The grade 15 and grade 14 placebos are estimated over the the sample of students who graduated from high school between 2009 and 2014, filed a financial aid application in their high school graduation year and were eligible to a need-based grant in that same year. The grade 16 placebo is estimates on the sample of students from the same cohorts who were not eligible to a need-based grant in their high school graduation year. In all three cases, students on both sides of placebo grade threshold are not eligible to different amounts of financial aid. I report full sample estimates (\"No Donut\") and estimates obtained when excluding students with Bac grades in $[\\\\text{placebo} - 0.3, \\\\text{placebo} + 0.05]$ (\"Donut $[...]$\"). Associated conventional 95\\\\% confidence intervals are reported in brackets. Statistical significance is computed based on the conventional p-value and ***, **, and * indicate significance at 1, 5, and 10\\\\%, respectively.",
           threeparttable = TRUE, escape = F) %>%
  save_kable(file = glue("{path_tables}/placebos_bandwidth_1.tex"))
```

## Table A7: Discontinuity in Predicted Outcomes at the Merit Aid Eligibility Threshold

```{r}
coef_ci_clean <- fread(here("out/tables/raw_data/rd_predictions_method_robustness.csv")) |> 
  filter(outcomes != "grad_7_all")

results_clean <- out_tab_prediction(coef_ci_clean)

n_columns = ncol(results_clean) - 1

coef_table <- kbl(results_clean, "latex",
                    booktabs = T,
                    caption = "Discontinuity in Predicted Outcomes at the Merit Aid Eligibility Threshold",
                    label = "rd_predictions",
                    linesep = "",
                    col.names = c("", paste0("(", 1:n_columns,")")),
                    escape = FALSE,
                    align = c("l",rep("c", n_columns))) %>%
    kable_styling(position = "center", latex_options = c("HOLD_position","scale_down")) %>% 
    footnote(general_title = "",
             general = "\\\\textit{Notes:} This table reports estimates of the discontinuity in predicted outcomes at the merit aid eligibility threshold (16/20 Bac grade). Each predicted outcome is reported in the first column's rows, with the prediction regression adjusted R$^2$ in parenthesis. HS grad. stands for high school graduation. The predictors used for the predictions are: female dummy, age, high school graduation year, SES (5 categories), parent income, need-based grant echelon (4 cat.), education academie (Paris, 5 largest), born in Paris region dummy, high school track (3 categories) and private high school dummy (i.e., students' characteristics in Table \\\\ref{tab:rd_observables}). The prediction model includes no interactions and is estimated by OLS. I report full sample estimates ('No Donut') and estimates obtained when excluding students with Bac grades in $[15.7, 16.05]$ ('Donut $[15.7, 16.05]$'). Moreover, estimates for two different bandwidths are reported: the MSE-optimal and $(15, 17)$ bandwidths. The MSE-optimal bandwidth, obtained using the \\\\textit{rdrobust} R package, varies across each outcome. For MSE-optimal bandwidth estimates, the ranges in brackets correspond to associated robust 95\\\\% confidence intervals, while they correspond to associated conventional 95\\\\% confidence intervals for $(15, 17)$ bandwidth estimates. Statistical significance is computed based on the relevant p-value and ***, **, and * indicate significance at 1, 5, and 10\\\\%, respectively.", 
             threeparttable = TRUE, footnote_as_chunk = T, escape = F) %>%
    add_header_above(c("", rep(c("MSE-Optimal", "(15, 17)"), 2)), line = F) %>%
    add_header_above(c("", "Bandwidth:" = 4), italic = T, line = F) %>%
    add_header_above(c("", "No Donut" = 2, "Donut [15.7, 16.05]" = 2)) %>%
    # add a horizontal rule just before row 35
    row_spec(34, extra_latex_after = "\\addlinespace[0.3em]\\hline\\addlinespace[0.3em]")

coef_table %>% save_kable(file = glue("{path_tables}/rd_predictions_method_robustness.tex"))
```

## Table A8: Power Analysis Summary

```{r}
# outcomes - split between binary and continuous
out.vars <- c("enrol_year_bac_all_0914",
              "enrol_anytime_all_0914",
              "enrol_2_ontime_all_0914",
              "enrol_2_anytime_all_0914",
              "enrol_3_ontime_all_0914",
              "enrol_3_anytime_all_0914",
              "quality",
              "quality_bacyear_plus1",
              "quality_bacyear_plus2",
              "tot_enrol_yrs",
              "max_enrol_degetu",
              "grad_5_all",
              "grad_9_all",
              "master_anytime_all",
              "master_select_anytime_all",
              "quality_first_grad_degree",
              "max_ects_credits")

power_rdpower_all <- bind_rows(fread(here(paste0("out/data/rdpower_all_binary_outcomes.csv"))) |> 
                                 filter(outcome != "grad_7_all"),
                               fread(here(paste0("out/data/rdpower_all_continuous_outcomes.csv")))) |> 
  select(-y_mean) |> 
  left_join(fread(here("out/data/mean_y_outcomes.csv"))) |> 
  left_join(fread(here("out/data/out_vars_labs.csv")) |> 
              filter(outcome != "grad_7_all") |> 
              select(-order) |>
              mutate(order = c(1:6, 10:12, 7:10, 18, 13:15)))

# obtain minimum detectable effects
min_detect_effect <- power_rdpower_all |> 
  filter(power >= .8) |> 
  slice_min(tau, by = c(outcome, bandwidth)) |> 
  mutate(pct = tau/mean_y)

# obtain baseline RD estimates to facilitate comparison between coefficients and MDEs
coefs <- out.vars |> 
  map(~ bind_rows(out_coef_ci(read_rds(here(glue("out/regressions/{.x}_bandwidth_mse.rds")))),
                  out_coef_ci(read_rds(here(glue("out/regressions/{.x}_bandwidth_1.rds"))))) |> 
        filter(poly == 1 & donut == T & controls == F) |> 
        mutate(outcome = .x)) |> 
  bind_rows()

# clean coefficient data.frame
coefs_clean <- coefs |> 
  mutate(bandwidth = ifelse(h_bandwidth == 1, "(15, 17)", "MSE-optimal"),
         across(contains("coef"), ~ round(., 3)),
         across(contains("ci_"), ~ round(., 2)),
         ci_95 = ifelse(bandwidth == "(15, 17)", paste0("[", ci_lower, ", ", ci_upper, "]"), paste0("[", robust_ci_lower, ", ", robust_ci_upper, "]"))) |> 
  select(outcome, bandwidth, coef, ci_95)

min_detect_effect <- min_detect_effect |> 
  left_join(coefs_clean, by = c("outcome", "bandwidth"))

min_detect_effect_clean <- min_detect_effect |> 
  select(-power) |> 
  pivot_wider(names_from = bandwidth,
              values_from = c(coef, ci_95, tau, pct)) |>
  clean_names() |> 
  arrange(order) |> 
  select(outcome_lab, mean_y, coef_mse_optimal, ci_95_mse_optimal, tau_mse_optimal, pct_mse_optimal, coef_15_17, ci_95_15_17, tau_15_17, pct_15_17) |> 
  mutate(across(contains("pct"), ~ scales::percent(.x, accuracy = .1)),
         across(contains("tau"), ~ round(.x, 3)),
         mean_y = round(mean_y, 2))

n_columns <- ncol(min_detect_effect_clean) - 1

# fwrite(min_detect_effect_clean, here("out/tables/raw_data/power_analysis_all.csv"))

min_detect_effect_clean |> kable("latex",
                                 booktabs = T,
                                 caption = "Power Analysis - Minimum Detectable Effects for All Outcomes",
                                 label = "power_analysis_all",
                                 position = "H",
                                 linesep = "\\addlinespace[\\smallskipamount]",
                                 col.names = c("", paste0("(", 1:n_columns,")")),
                                 escape = T,
                                 align = c("l",rep("c", n_columns))) |>
  add_header_above(c("Outcome",
                     "\\\\thead{Mean\\\\\\\\ \\\\footnotesize \\\\textit{[15.5, 15.7)}}",
                     rep(c("\\\\thead{RD Point\\\\\\\\Estimate}",
                           "\\\\thead{95\\\\% Confidence\\\\\\\\Interval}",
                           "\\\\thead{Minimum\\\\\\\\Detectable\\\\\\\\Effect}",
                           "\\\\thead{\\\\%\\\\\\\\Baseline\\\\\\\\Mean}"), 2)), line = F, escape = F) |> 
  add_header_above(c("", "", "MSE-Optimal" = 4, "(15, 17)" = 4), line = T, escape = F) |> 
  pack_rows("Panel A. Enrollment", 1, 2, bold = F, italic = T) |> 
  pack_rows("Panel B. Persistence", 3, 8, bold = F, italic = T) |> 
  pack_rows("Panel C. Degree Completion", 9, 10, bold = F, italic = T) |> 
  pack_rows("Panel D. Degree Quality", 11, 13, bold = F, italic = T) |> 
  pack_rows("Panel E. Enrollment in Graduate Degree and Academic Performance Proxies", 14, 17, bold = F, italic = T) |>
  kable_styling(position = "center", latex_options = c("scale_down")) |>  
  footnote(general_title = "",
           general =  "\\\\textit{Notes:} This table reports minimum detectable effects for all outcomes, for both the MSE-optimal and the $(15, 17)$ bandwidths. Column (1) reports the mean outcome for students with Bac grade in $[15.5, 15.7)$. Baseline RD estimates (cols. (2) and (6)) are reported for comparison purposes as well as associated 95\\\\% confidence intervals. The MSE-optimal bandwidth, obtained using the \\\\textit{rdrobust} R package, varies across each outcome. For MSE-optimal bandwidth estimates, the associated confidence intervals correspond to robust 95\\\\% confidence intervals, while they correspond to conventional 95\\\\% confidence intervals for $(15, 17)$ bandwidth estimates. Columns (4) and (8) report minimum detectable effects (MDE), that is the smallest effect size detectable with 80\\\\% power at the 5\\\\% significance level, while columns (5) and (9) report the magnitude of the MDE relative the baseline mean (col. (1)). Statistical significance is computed based on the relevant p-value and ***, **, and * indicate significance at 1, 5, and 10\\\\%, respectively.",
           footnote_as_chunk = TRUE,
           threeparttable = TRUE, escape = F) |>
  save_kable(file = glue("{path_tables}/power_analysis_all.tex"))
```

## Table A9: Heterogeneity of Effects of Eligibility for the Merit Aid by Livng Costs of Urban Area of Study

```{r}
baseline_avg_expensive_cities <- fread(here("out/tables/raw_data/baseline_avg_expensive_cities.csv"))

outcomes_keep <- c("enrol_2_ontime_all_0914",
                   "enrol_3_ontime_all_0914",
                   "tot_enrol_yrs",
                   "max_enrol_degetu",
                   "grad_9_all")

diff_samples <- c("outcomes_expensive_cities_mse",
                  "outcomes_expensive_cities",
                  "outcomes_expensive_cities_same_au_mse",
                  "outcomes_expensive_cities_same_au",
                  "outcomes_expensive_cities_different_au_mse",
                  "outcomes_expensive_cities_different_au",
                  "outcomes_notexpensive_cities_mse",
                  "outcomes_notexpensive_cities",
                  "outcomes_notexpensive_cities_same_au_mse",
                  "outcomes_notexpensive_cities_same_au",
                  "outcomes_notexpensive_cities_different_au_mse",
                  "outcomes_notexpensive_cities_different_au")

coef_expensive_cities <- diff_samples |> 
  map(~ fread(paste0(here(glue("out/regressions/{.x}.csv")))) |> 
        mutate(var = .x)) |> 
  bind_rows() |> 
  mutate(across(contains("sig"), ~ ifelse(is.na(.x), "", .x)))

coef_expensive_cities_clean <- coef_expensive_cities |>
  left_join(baseline_avg_expensive_cities |> rename(outcome = outcomes)) |> 
  mutate(bandwidth = ifelse(h_bandwidth == 1, "(15, 17)", "mse")) |> 
  filter(controls == F & donut == T & var %in% diff_samples) %>% 
  mutate(coef = ifelse(bandwidth == "mse",
                       paste0(round(coef, 3), "$^{", robust_sig, "}$"),
                       paste0(round(coef, 3), "$^{", sig, "}$")),
         ci = ifelse(bandwidth == "mse",
                     paste0("[", round(robust_ci_lower, 2), ", ", round(robust_ci_upper, 2), "]"),
                     paste0("[", round(ci_lower, 2), ", ", round(ci_upper, 2), "]")),
         mean_y = as.character(round(mean_y, 2)),
         n_obs = formatC(n_cont + n_treat, big.mark = ",")) %>% 
  select(outcome, var, mean_y, coef, ci, n_obs, bandwidth) |>
  pivot_longer(cols = c(mean_y, coef, ci, n_obs),
               names_to = "stat") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = outcome) %>%
  mutate(bandwidth = case_when(bandwidth == "mse" & stat == "mean_y" ~ "Mean [15.5, 15.7)",
                               bandwidth == "mse" & stat == "coef" ~ "MSE-optimal bandwidth",
                               bandwidth == "mse" & stat == "ci" ~ "",
                               bandwidth == "(15, 17)" & stat == "coef" ~ "(15, 17) bandwidth",
                               bandwidth == "(15, 17)" & stat == "ci" ~ "",
                               stat == "n_obs" ~ "Observations")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(bandwidth)) |>
  select(bandwidth, all_of(outcomes_keep))

n_columns <- ncol(coef_expensive_cities_clean) - 1

table <- kbl(coef_expensive_cities_clean,
             "latex",
             booktabs = T,
             caption = "Heterogeneity of Effects of Eligibility for the Merit Aid by Living Costs of Location of Study",
             label = "expensive_cities",
             position = "H",
             linesep = "",
             col.names = c("", paste0("(", 1:n_columns,")")),
             escape = F,
             align = c("l",rep("c", n_columns))) %>%
  add_header_above(c("", "\\\\thead{Enrollment in 2nd\\\\\\\\Year in\\\\\\\\HS Grad. Year + 1}",
                     "\\\\thead{Enrollment in 3rd\\\\\\\\Year in\\\\\\\\HS Grad. Year + 2}",
                     "\\\\thead{Number of\\\\\\\\Years in\\\\\\\\Higher Education}",
                     "\\\\thead{Highest Level of\\\\\\\\Study Attained}",
                     "\\\\thead{Degree Completion\\\\\\\\within 9 Years}"),
                   line = F, escape = F) %>% 
  pack_rows("Panel A. Most Expensive Urban Areas", 1, 7, bold = F, italic = T) %>%
  pack_rows("Panel B. Most Expensive Urban Areas - Same Urban Area of Origin", 8, 14, bold = F, italic = T) %>%
    pack_rows("Panel C. Most Expensive Urban Areas - Different Urban Area of Origin", 15, 21, bold = F, italic = T) %>%
  pack_rows("Panel D. Not Most Expensive Urban Area", 22, 28, bold = F, italic = T) %>%
  pack_rows("Panel E. Not Most Expensive Urban Area - Same Urban Area of Origin", 29, 35, bold = F, italic = T) %>%
  pack_rows("Panel F. Not Most Expensive Urban Area - Different Urban Area of Origin", 36, 42, bold = F, italic = T) %>%
  kable_styling(position = "center", latex_options = c("scale_down")) %>% 
  footnote(general_title = "",
           general =  "\\\\textit{Notes:} This table reports estimates of the discontinuity in higher education outcomes at the merit aid eligibility threshold (16/20 Bac grade), excluding students with Bac grades in $[15.7, 16.05]$. Panel A reports estimates on the subsample of students studying in an urban area in the top 20\\\\% in terms of average rent. Panel B and C report estimates on the subsample of students studying in an urban area in the top 20\\\\% in terms of average rent that is the same or different as their urban area of origin (high school). Panel D reports estimates on the subsample of students not studying in an urban area in the top 20\\\\% in terms of average rent. Panel E and F report estimates on the subsample of students not studying in an urban area in the top 20\\\\% in terms of average rent that is the same or different from their urban area of origin (high school). Urban area's average rents are estimated using the \\\\textit{Student Life Observatory}’s 2010 \\\\textit{Survey of Students’ Living Conditions}. For each panel, the first row reports estimates obtained using the MSE-optimal bandwidth (using the rdrobust R package), and the third row reports estimates obtained using the $(15, 17)$ bandwidth. For MSE-optimal bandwidth estimates, the ranges in brackets correspond to associated robust 95\\\\% confidence intervals, while they correspond to associated conventional 95\\\\% confidence intervals for $(15, 17)$ bandwidth estimates. Statistical significance is computed based on the relevant p-value and ***, **, and * indicate significance at 1, 5, and 10\\\\%, respectively.",
           footnote_as_chunk = TRUE,
           threeparttable = TRUE, escape = F)
table
save_kable(table, glue("{path_tables}/expensive_cities_analysis_new.tex"))
```
